title: Parkio Daily for May 11, 2026
teaser: Holiday entertainment returns to Magic Kingdom this winter, and the Polynesian boat dock closes for repairs through early June.

bignews.title: Polynesian Boat Dock Closes for Maintenance Through Early June
bignews.body: The boat dock at Disney's Polynesian Village Resort begins routine maintenance today and will suspend service until June 5th. Guests can still use the monorail or bus transportation to reach Magic Kingdom and EPCOT during the closure.

parkioInsight.text: Monorail lines from the Polynesian may be slightly heavier than usual during morning rush. Leaving 10 minutes earlier for rope drop often helps avoid the longest waits at the platform.

bignews.title: Holiday Entertainment Confirmed for Mickey's Very Merry Christmas Party 2026
bignews.body: Casting calls reveal that Frozen Holiday Surprise and Mickey's Most Merriest Celebration will return to Magic Kingdom for this year's Christmas party. Disney has not yet announced event dates or ticket pricing for the 2026 season.

parkioInsight.text: Christmas party tickets typically sell fastest during the first and last event nights. Booking mid-season dates in early November often secures lower prices and lighter event crowds.

topstories.title: Jollywood Nights Returns to Hollywood Studios This Holiday Season
topstories.body: New performer casting notices confirm the after-hours Christmas event will take place at Disney's Hollywood Studios again in 2026. Official dates and ticket prices have not been announced, though details are expected by mid-summer based on prior years.

parkioInsight.text: Hollywood Studios tends to close early on event nights, cutting regular park hours short. Checking the calendar before booking tickets usually helps avoid losing afternoon ride time on party days.

topstories.title: Old Navy Launches New Disney Mickey & Friends Summer Collection
topstories.body: Old Navy and Disney released an expanded Americana-themed collection featuring Mickey Mouse, available in stores and online starting May 13th. The line includes apparel for all ages with vintage summer graphics.

parkioInsight.text: Matching family outfits tend to photograph well at Magic Kingdom's Americana-heavy Main Street. Wearing coordinated pieces often helps groups stay together in larger crowds too.

topstories.title: Disney Store Celebrates America's 250th Anniversary With New Merch
topstories.body: A new Americana collection launched online featuring patriotic Minnie ears, designer bags, and summer apparel. The line commemorates the United States' 250th anniversary with red-white-and-blue Mickey-themed designs.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition ears and accessories often sell out quickly at park retail locations. Shopping online before your trip may save time hunting down popular styles at World of Disney.

topstories.title: It's a Small World 60th Anniversary Collection Now Available
topstories.body: Disneyland's classic attraction receives a vintage-inspired souvenir line marking six decades of operation. The collection includes retro-styled bags, apparel, and accessories available at the Disney Store and select Disneyland Resort locations.

parkioInsight.text: Anniversary merchandise tends to move fastest at shops near the featured attraction. Stopping by It's a Small World Toy Shop early in your Disneyland day usually offers the best selection.

icymi.title: Airlines Add Nonstop Routes to Orlando After Spirit Shutdown
icymi.body: Southwest, JetBlue, and Breeze are expanding service to Florida airports following Spirit Airlines' closure last weekend. The new routes aim to fill capacity gaps for travelers heading to Disney World and other Orlando destinations.

icymi.title: Cinderella Castle Painting Project Remains Unfinished
icymi.body: Ongoing touch-up work on Magic Kingdom's icon continues to draw guest complaints as scaffolding and tarps remain visible months after the project began. Disney has not provided an updated completion timeline.

spotlight.title: Early Entry Strategy: When Hollywood Studios Gets Rough
spotlight.body: A crowded Early Entry morning at Hollywood Studios can derail even the best touring plan. On peak days, attraction queues fill faster than usual and bottlenecks form at Galaxy's Edge and Toy Story Land. The key is flexibility: if your first choice has a long line, pivoting to a second-tier ride often saves more time than waiting it out.

parkioInsight.text: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster and Tower of Terror tend to stay walkable longer during Early Entry than Slinky Dog or Rise. Hitting Sunset Boulevard first may cover more ground when Galaxy's Edge is packed.
